channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Guest column | These tests claim to tell your ‘biological age.’ Why the science isn’t there yet. - The Washington Post
item.description:

item.description: Do Supplements Help You Sleep? Here’s What to Know.  The New York TimesView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: Psychology says people who quietly leave parties early without saying goodbye to everyone aren't being rude — they've simply learned that their presence was never as central to the room as their anxiety told them it was, and that realization is both humbling - VegOut
item.description: Psychology says people who quietly leave parties early without saying goodbye to everyone aren't being rude — they've simply learned that their presence was never as central to the room as their anxiety told them it was, and that realization is both humbling  VegOut
